highlights.text: I wrote Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is always just to defer to the trend.
Institutions buy dips via Failed Breakdowns.
I wrote last Thursday at 4pm: “An option is to wait for another Failed Breakdown here.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into the monster Failed Breakdown we saw after FOMC last week which gave us a 120 point rally in two days.

post_title: SPX Goes Parabolic To Start The Last Week Of September. How Much Gas Is In The Tank? Sept 23 Plan
